name: Investment Advisory Committee
summary:
• Receive a report from Meeder Investments. Receive and file.
  • Receive a report on short-term investments from City Treasurer. Receive and file.
  • Create a subcommittee to consider the performance of investments that are outsourced and managed internally. Appoint a two member subcommittee.
